tasks.subject: Task 1: Add metadata flags to CLI Create variant and handler
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Extend the `Create` subcommand with `--status`, `--priority`, `--type`, `--tags`, `--depends-on` flags and wire them through the handler.

**Files:**
- Modify: `crates/tandem-cli/src/main.rs`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [x] `tndm ticket create --help` shows all five new flags
- [x] `mise run check` passes

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/tandem-cli/src/main.rs"], "verifyCommand": "mise run check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["create --help shows all five new flags", "mise run check passes"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Add integration tests for create flags
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Verify each new flag works correctly, including combined usage and edge cases.

**Files:**
- Modify: `crates/tandem-cli/tests/ticket_cli_tests.rs`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Combined flags test passes
- [ ] Invalid values rejected
- [ ] `mise run test` passes

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/tandem-cli/tests/ticket_cli_tests.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test --test ticket_cli_tests", "acceptanceCriteria": ["combined flags test passes", "invalid values rejected", "all tests pass"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Update plugin documentation
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Update SKILL.md and command-reference.md to reflect that `create` now accepts metadata flags. Bump plugin version.

**Files:**
- Modify: `plugin/tndm/skills/ticket/SKILL.md`
- Modify: `plugin/tndm/skills/ticket/references/command-reference.md`
- Modify: `plugin/tndm/.claude-plugin/plugin.json`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] SKILL.md shows metadata flags on create
- [ ] command-reference.md documents all new flags
- [ ] Plugin version bumped

```json:metadata
{"files": ["plugin/tndm/skills/ticket/SKILL.md", "plugin/tndm/skills/ticket/references/command-reference.md", "plugin/tndm/.claude-plugin/plugin.json"], "verifyCommand": "", "acceptanceCriteria": ["SKILL.md updated", "command-reference.md updated", "plugin version bumped"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```
